task_completion.description: Create a style named 'composite_hatch' in the 'ne' workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GeoServer Style Editor page where the 'Name' field is 'composite_hatch' and the 'Workspace' dropdown is set to 'ne'.

task_completion.description: Include a solid Light Grey background fill (#E0E0E0)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the SLD code in the editor for a <Fill> element containing <CssParameter name="fill">#E0E0E0</CssParameter>.

task_completion.description: Include a diagonal hatch pattern overlay using 'shape://slash' with Dark Grey stroke (#333333), size 8, and stroke-width 1
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the SLD code for a <GraphicFill> element containing <WellKnownName>shape://slash</WellKnownName>, <Size>8</Size>, and a <Stroke> with <CssParameter name="stroke">#333333</CssParameter> and <CssParameter name="stroke-width">1</CssParameter>.

task_completion.description: Include a solid Black border outline (#000000) with stroke-width 0.5
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the SLD code for a <Stroke> element (representing the polygon border) containing <CssParameter name="stroke">#000000</CssParameter> and <CssParameter name="stroke-width">0.5</CssParameter>.

task_completion.description: Assign the style as the Default Style for the 'ne:ne_countries' layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Edit Layer page for 'ne_countries', specifically the 'Publishing' tab, where 'composite_hatch' (or 'ne:composite_hatch') is selected in the 'Default Style' dropdown.

integrity.description: The agent used the GeoServer web interface to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GeoServer web administration interface in a browser, rather than terminal commands or API requests.

integrity.description: The SLD code was entered into the GeoServer Style Editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The XML/SLD code should be visible inside the GeoServer Style Editor text area, not just in an external text editor.

integrity.description: The layer configuration changes were saved
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a success message or the agent returning to the Layers list after assigning the default style, indicating the changes were applied.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected style name is 'composite_hatch' in the 'ne' workspace. The SLD must contain specific hex colors: #E0E0E0 (background), #333333 (hatch stroke), and #000000 (border). The hatch pattern uses the GeoServer extension 'shape://slash' as the WellKnownName. The target layer is 'ne_countries'.
